title: L1: Binary Place Values
description: Understanding 8-bit binary place values and how bits build denary numbers.

steps.title: Binary Places
steps.content:
Binary place values

Binary uses only two digits: 0 and 1. Each column is worth twice as much as the column to its right.

1286432168421
10101001

A 1 means include that place value. A 0 means ignore it.

steps.title: Step Through: Read Bits
steps.content:
Step through an example

Click through each stage to see how the total is built.
steps.js:
BinaryLesson.createStepper({containerId:'y9pv-stepper-1',steps:[{title:'We are converting 10101001 to denary',html:'
10101001
',note:'Each bit sits under a place value. Only the columns with a 1 in them count.'},{title:'Line each bit up under its place value',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([1,0,1,0,1,0,0,1]),note:'The bright cells are the 1s — those are the only columns we add up. The active columns here are 128, 32, 8 and 1.'},{title:'Add the active columns',html:'

128 + 32 + 8 + 1 = 169

',note:'10101001 in denary is 169.'}]});

steps.title: Step Through: Missing Places
steps.content:
Another step-through question

This time focus on identifying active place values before adding.
steps.js:
BinaryLesson.createStepper({containerId:'y9pv-stepper-2',steps:[{title:'We are converting 01011010 to denary',html:'
01011010
',note:'Find which columns have a 1, then add their place values together.'},{title:'Line each bit up under its place value',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([0,1,0,1,1,0,1,0]),note:'The bright cells show the 1s. The active columns are 64, 16, 8 and 2.'},{title:'Add the active columns',html:'

64 + 16 + 8 + 2 = 90

',note:'01011010 in denary is 90.'}]});

steps.title: Checked Practice 1
steps.content:
Checked practice: active places

Type the denary total for each binary number. You will get feedback after each answer.

steps.title: Checked Practice 2
steps.content:
Checked practice: build numbers

Type the 8-bit binary number that matches the active place values.

steps.title: Endless Practice
steps.content:
Endless practice

Answer 5 generated questions correctly. The step will mark itself complete automatically when you hit the target.

steps.title: End of Lesson Exam
steps.content:
End of lesson exam

Answer all questions. Feedback appears after each one.

quizQuestions.q: Which place value is furthest left in an 8-bit binary number?
In 01010000, which place values are active?
Convert this binary number to denary.
Convert a denary number to 8-bit binary.
What does a 0 in a binary column mean?
options: Do not include that place value
